title: セントライト記念にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The St. Lite Kinen—the race preceding the Kikuka
Sho—is about to start, and this is where Kitasan
Black's autumn officially begins.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Let's do this, Trainer! The big race is 3,000
meters long, but first I've only gotta conquer this
2,200 meter one!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'll be your trainer's backup, so no worries!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Kitasan Black's races are only going to get
longer from here on, she has to get used to the
distance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We should be able to get a better picture of how
suited she is for medium and long-distance races
this fall, but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
This is it! The prelude to the Kikuka Sho! Kitasan
Black, ready to go!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Wow, look how energized Kitasan Black is. But
will she be okay running such a long race?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Of course she'll be fine! After all, she's
got a trump card...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Rumor has it she's Sakura Bakushin O's
apprentice. But I dunno... I'm not positive that
she's a good fit for Kitasan.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! How can such baseless rumors about
me be spreading like this?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: They're not exactly baseless... Still...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Um... Trainer? Maybe I'm not cut out for long
races after all...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Um, but didn't you say you weren't sure if I can
handle them not too long ago?
choice_data_list: I wasn't sure yet then, but I am pretty sure now.
I wasn't sure yet then, but I am pretty sure now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't make any guarantees, but as her trainer, I
give her my honest opinion. I saw firsthand how
much progress she made this summer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her musculature, her form, her footwork. When it
comes to distance running, all of those aspects fit
the bill. Not to mention...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black has the heart to endure these
longer races. Right now, I'm more expectant of
her success than concerned about her failure.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Do you really think I'll be okay?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay... Even if it wasn't fine, I was prepared to
not let it get to me, but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Since you're so sure of me, then I have nothing to
be scared of!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Just you watch me, Trainer. I'm not going to trip
on my first step into fall. I absolutely won't...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Not when Brusquement is getting stronger and
waiting for me! I'll run like the wind to victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Lying in wait for us is a racing
prodigy whom Air Groove personally mentored
and trained.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This race will add another peak to our mountain
of hard work, which we will use as a stepping
stone to become even stronger.
